data.title: Gilead Sciences/Merck's Investigational Once-Weekly HIV Combo Therapy Shows Sustained Virus Suppression To 48 Weeks
data.description: Gilead Sciences and Merck presented Phase 2 results showing 94.2% viral suppression in HIV patients treated with islatravir and lenacapavir. Both weekly and daily treatments achieved comparable success at Week 48, with minimal adverse effects.

data.title: Peering Into Northrop Grumman's Recent Short Interest
Mark Cuban Dismisses Polymarket Election Odds As Meaningless: 'Most Of The Money Is Foreign'
data.description: Billionaire Mark Cuban doubts Polymarket's election odds, citing foreign money and legality issues. He also eyes role as SEC Chair to support crypto growth.

data.title: JAB Strengthens Hold On Coffee Company JDE Peet's As Mondelez Sells Off 86M Shares
data.description: Mondelez International agreed to sell 86 million JDE Peet's shares to JAB for €25.10 per share. JAB also distributed shares to 70 limited partners, increasing free float to 32%.
